name: stop-wasting-tokens
description: Token-disciplined SDLC for the Codex CLI. Plan, execute, and verify multi-week projects without burning tokens on rework.
author: Tiago Serôdio (@yidakee)

commands.name: swt init
commands.description: Bootstrap a new project (greenfield or brownfield)

commands.name: swt vibe
commands.description: Plan, execute, verify, archive — auto-routed via the 11 lifecycle states

commands.name: swt detect-phase
commands.description: Inspect routing state (JSON or VBW-compatible bash format)

commands.name: swt update
commands.description: Check the npm registry for a newer published version

commands.name: swt status
commands.description: Show current phase and milestone status

commands.name: swt doctor
commands.description: Check that SWT prerequisites are installed
